hero.kicker: Boys Club Volleyball residing in Eagle Mountain, Utah
hero.title: Train With Purpose. Build Character. Fly Higher Together.
hero.copy: Utah Flight is built for athletes who want to compete with the best, develop skills, and a club culture that feels intense, positive, and united.

programs.title: Boys Middle School Development
programs.copy: Our middle school team is perfect for middle school aged kids wanting to develop more advanced skills and compete at an advanced level

programs.title: Boys High School Club Teams
programs.copy: Our club teams compete well against the best in Utah. Our teams typically place in the highest bracket of the tournaments they play in.

programs.title: Girls Club
programs.copy: Not currently offered - please contact us

gallery.title: Salt City Boys Slay Tournament Champs
gallery.copy: Utah Flight 18s - winners of 18u Salt City Boys Slay Tournament 2025.

gallery.title: Vortex Tournament Runner Up
gallery.copy: Runner-up finish photo of Flight 18s from the 2025 Vortex 18 Open Tournament event.

timeline.title: Tryouts for 2026 Club
timeline.copy: Our club teams compete against the best clubs in Utah and will play in 6-7 tournaments, including 1-2 travel tournaments

timeline.title: Club Season
timeline.copy: Practices will be twice a week starting in August, with tournaments starting in September going through December

contact.title: Volleyball is our passion.  We want to hear from you.
contact.copy: Contact us at Volleyballroof@gmail.com.  We would love to hear from you and what needs you have for volleyball here in the Eagle Mountain area.
